name: Khatte Channe
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat and fry the onions for 20 minutes, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
2. Add garlic and cook for 2 minutes.
3. Stir in turmeric and red pepper flakes briefly.
4. Add chopped tomatoes and grated ginger; cook until the fat begins to separate from the gravy, about 5 minutes.
5. Stir in tamarind paste and approximately 1 cup of reserved chickpea stock. Cover and simmer gently for 15 minutes.
6. Add the cooked chick peas, garam masala, and ground cumin. Cook for an additional 10 minutes.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed. Serve garnished with onion slices and shredded green chilies alongside Poori.
